name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BG276, Miu Miu new Isetan limited edition tote bag, a main website bestseller, this year's absolute hit🔥 style, top-grade imported vintage distressed lambskin, fine, smooth, and soft leather surface, vintage distressed design, looks high-end and premium, superior leather texture, soft but structured body, large size design, effortless and lazy chic, huge capacity, 100% head-turner on the street, hand-stitched leather logo, brand new linen lining, two zippered pockets, dimensions 38X 38 X18Cm, comes with original packaging
